title: えっアタシのバイト……ヤバすぎ？

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...So what I'm saying is, I've come to a realization.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're not really free unless you're paying your
own way.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Otherwise, you're just living like a sheep off
someone else's dime! And I ain't no lamb chop!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm heading to a part-time gig, duh! And you're
coming with me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I'm gonna get moolah on the clock. Pull
myself up by my bootstraps, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, Tracen Academy does
allow part-time work, as long as the student gets
permission.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Thing is, permission is taking forever. Weird, right? Can't they see how raring to go I am?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I'd have reservations about letting her loose on
the world as well.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't go nodding along with that! Doesn't it
bother you that your student's getting frozen
out?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm not gonna stand for this! There's only
one thing for it...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I gotta practice up before I take on the real thing!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ding ding ding! Got some hits!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Better screw on your thinking cap, 'cause it's
decision time!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Your choices are... One: Fantabulous ☆ Physical
Labor with the Dorm Leader! Or two:
Splendiferous ☆ Yakisoba Noodle Fry-Up!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Tick, tock... Oh, and if you run out the clock,
you're in for some Paintastic ☆ Trainer Origami!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! So you've come to help, have you?
Thanks a million!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's Ritto Dorm's turn to clean the pool, but we're
rather shorthanded. You're lifesavers!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Think nothing of it, young mistress—your faithful
maid Golshi lives only to serve! This limescale will
be all gone in a scrub-scrubbity-scrub!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Erm... That sounds splendid, but... why are you
talking like that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her latest bit aside, Gold Ship does a surprisingly
thorough job cleaning the pool.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: All right, dirt! Prepare to meet your maker!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Students
text_block_list.text:
What graceful technique! She wields the brush
like an extension of her arm... No, her entire body
is one with the brush!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You too? What on earth has gotten into everyone
today?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Phew! I "maid" short work of that mission!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm impressed. Without your help, this would have
taken twice the time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I can't offer you money, but still, I'd like to
reward your efforts somehow.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
For real?! I can have anything I want? That's what
you said, right?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Not in the slightest!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hmm-hmm! Let's see...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! I wanna freeze all the water in this pool
and make shaved ice out of it!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... That's an amusing idea, but from a
hygiene perspective, I'm afraid there would be
issues...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Tachyooon! Gimme some of that
insta-freeze powder, and lots of it!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The perfect partner in crime! ...I mean, hold it,
Golshi! Stop, I say!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship takes off with the deck brush, and Fuji
Kiseki and I gave chase. In the end, we all
collapse from exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship gathers all the equipment and
ingredients for yakisoba in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've come for yakisoba. I hear this place serves
the good stuff.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You heard right, my friend! So just one... no, two
of you today?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oohhh, dat's one nice-lookin' pan ya got dere.
And dat stove looks like it could put out some
real heat!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Naniwa's gutsiest's got a cravin'... I got high hopes
for dat yakisoba, Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but I got no words to say to either of you.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
My frying pan does all the talkin'. That's the vow I
made when I chose this life five minutes ago!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship deftly fries up the noodles like a real
pro!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: OHHH YEEEAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Her form's darn near flawless! Da way she
flips da noodles... She's steamin' off all dat excess
water so's dey don't get soggy!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...This isn't good, Tama. For the first time in my
life, I fear... I may drool!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Da heck's up wid dis?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Dis here flavor, I can't put it inna words...
Nothin'll do it justice!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Seconds, please!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Heh... Well, maybe dat'll do.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Tamamo, does that mean...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yer legit! Naniwa's soul lives in ya! The title
of ultimate yakisoba fryin' Umamusume is all yers!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Tamamo! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Um... Seconds please...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's yakisoba is so good that all of life's
little problems seem to melt away with one bite.
